error_signature: profileview variable is null on page refresh
title: Profile view variable loses data on page refresh
symptom: After refreshing the profile page, the profileview variable becomes null, resulting in no data displayed for the user profile.
applies_when: User is on the profile page
Profile view variable is set with user ID
not_this_if: User navigates away from the profile page without refreshing
root_cause: The profileview variable is not saved in local storage, causing it to reset to null when the page is refreshed. The default behavior of the variable does not preserve its value across page refreshes unless explicitly configured to do so.
fix_steps: Go to the variables settings in your project.
Enable the 'Save in local storage' option.
Save the changes and test by refreshing the profile page.
agent_instruction: Enable the 'Save in local storage' option for the profileview variable to retain data on refresh.
